productDisplayName: Timberland Women Femmes Grey Casual Shoes
description: Your search for that absolutely comfortable floater comes to an end with the timberland Pinkham Mary Jane sandal. With a suede and mesh upper, this sandal offers comfort at its best. Upper Suede and mesh upper for absolute breathable comfort Suede midfoot strap with a button and elastic loop closure Zig-zag elastic bands on the forefoot for snug comfort Fabric inner lining for all-day sweat-free comfort Anti-fatigue foam footbed with a fabric lining for all-day comfort Midsole EVA midsole for durability and all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with leaf-shaped lugs throughout the footbed, concentric triangular lugs on the big toe mound and semi-circular lugs on the heel for absolute grip and traction Curved midfoot for inner arch support Floater care Wipe dust with a clean and dry cloth Use a suede brush to maintain the upper Do not wash or store in direct sunlight
